problem_solved: Patients face confusion and anxiety when searching for health information online, often encountering scary or misleading content
solution_description: AI-powered symptom checker that helps people figure out health issues and find the right care. Conversational AI asks questions to narrow down symptoms. Content written by clinicians and scientifically vetted. Guides users to appropriate products/services/doctors
traction_signals: Content reviewed by doctors, clinicians, nurses, therapists
Editorial quality standards - clear, actionable, not alarmist
notes: US-centric consumer symptom checker. Strong editorial standards combat health anxiety from online searching. 'Buoy it' branding suggests consumer-first approach
